name: Brianna - The Perfect Wife | Alt Scenario #1
description:
Your perfect Wife who seems to be just a perfect mix of girly and tomboy. Who just wants to run her farm with you before making a nice old-fashioned family together.

This is an alt scenario because I originally had this scenario for the 1st bot but just couldn't find out where the picture I have inside the bot. But I wanted to use that pic, but since I couldn't find it before I released the other one, I made this one. This'll probably be one of the only times I make a alt scenario unless people really want more.

I don't know any of the girls of if there's any drama around them, just got this because I couldn't find any good pics for what I wanted with drawings or made any with the AI I use. So I found an real life girl picture that fit what I was going for and rolled with it. Let me know if yall are fine with the irl stuff or want me to stick strictly to anime/AI stuff.


Leave any bots you want made in the comments and I'll try to do them. Make sure to try and leave the scenario + type of girl you want.

  • NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)

  • If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.

  • Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message.
creator: ExoTTG
